title: Thunderbird vs Outlook Which one is Good?
excerpt: Which email client is good.. Thunderbird or Outlook. Can somebody suggest to me which one is Good for future?

posts.author: abbotthoule (Abbott Houle)
posts.cookedHtml: Which email client is good.. Thunderbird or Outlook. Can somebody suggest to me which one is Good for future?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you want it to integrate with monday?

posts.author: abbotthoule (Abbott Houle)
posts.cookedHtml: @Clover_Gal Does this community also provide an email client like the famous one? I didn’t understand your thought. I mean, you want to ask or want me integrate with the Monday community.

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Abbott! If you’re looking to integrate your email inbox with the monday platform, I would recommend moving forward with Outlook. monday is not a native emailing platform/provider. Currently, we have native integrations with Outlook and Gmail, only. If you move forward with Thunderbird, and you’re looking to integrate your email inbox, you may need to look to external platforms like Zapier or Make.com to create a custom integration between your inbox and monday.
